C1.descriptionTemplate: Pollux obtains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: When Pollux's {Rouse} card is played and after the Discard Phase, gain 3 stacks of {Sin Mark}; for each card {Retained} in hand, gain 1 more stack of {Sin Mark}.

C4.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG to all enemies and draw 2 Command Cards with the lowest Arithmetica Cost.

C5.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG [Arg2] times. This card is automatically put in your hand when entering {Ultra Round}.

Exalt.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG to all enemies. Your next Pollux Command Card this turn gains {Atonement by Pain}. Put 1 {Sacred Heart} into hand.

OverExalt.descriptionTemplate: In this turn, all Pollux Command Cards gain +50% {Atonement by Pain} effect; his next Command Card takes effect 1 more time. Place 1 more {Sacred Heart} into hand.

promotedExtras.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG and gain 3 stacks of {Sin Mark}. After playing, shuffle this card to the top of the Draw Pile. On the 3rd play, {Exhaust} and allow the next command card to benefit from the {Atonement by Pain} effect.

T1.descriptionTemplate:
The first Command Card Pollux plays in a turn deals DMG+200% of his ATK, generates Shield +50% of his DEF, and +10 Aliemus.
After the battle, Pollux's Base DMG and the {Atonement by Pain} DMG effect are increased by 20% in exploration, and the {Atonement by Pain} DMG effect is doubled in Boss Battle.

T2.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Arg1] Aliemus after the start of exploration.

T3.descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF are increased by [Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
The Base DMG of {Atonement by Pain} increase by [Arg3]% of Pollux's ATK.
For every 50 stacks of {Sin Mark}, add 1 {Sacred Heart} to your hand.
When {Sin Mark} reaches 100 stacks, pull 1 Pollux's Skill Card after {Sacred Heart} is {Exhausted} at 3rd play.
When dealing DMG, the effect of {Sin Mark} is doubled against enemies of the "Church of the Lightbearers".

E1.descriptionTemplate: At the start of the battle, put 1 {Sacred Heart} into your hand.

E2.descriptionTemplate:
For each card in hand, {Strike} and {Defense} generate +1 Aliemus.
For each {Sacred Heart} played, the Arithmetica Cost of the next {Cleansing Judgement} is reduced by 1.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG [Arg2] times. Arithmetica Cost -1 for every {Sacred Heart} played. This card is automatically put in your hand when entering {Ultra Round}.

E3.descriptionTemplate: When {Exhausted} at its 3rd use, {Sacred Heart} causes Pollux's next Command Card to take effect 1 additional time.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG and gain 3 stacks of {Sin Mark}. After playing, shuffle this card into the top of the Draw Pile. On the 3rd play, {Exhaust} and make your next Command Card benefit from the {Atonement by Pain} effect, applying it 2 times.

derivedSkills.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG and gain 3 stacks of {Sin Mark}. After playing, shuffle this card to the top of the Draw Pile. On the 3rd play, {Exhaust} and allow the next command card to benefit from the {Atonement by Pain} effect.
